name: Sultan Temirbayev
background: Sultan Temirbayev is the Chief Financial Officer. He joined Kazatomprom from Samruk-Kazyna, where he held various senior positions in the asset management and privatization departments. He has a strong background in investment banking and financial analysis.

company_affiliations.name: National Atomic Company Kazatomprom JSC
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chief Financial Officer / Member of the Management Board
